creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Hi all.=20
 
 I hope it's okay to cc bugmeister@ but it seems this PR is completely mess=
 ed up. At least looking at http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi=3Fpr=3Dport=
 s/135929 I have the impression that all content included in this PR has be=
 en lost. It's fine if you just close the PR so I can simply open a new one=
 , but I want to write down what happened to this PR in case I hit a bug in=
  GNATS.
 
 I submitted the original PR: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-po=
 rts-bugs/2009-June/166728.html and dhn@ promptly took it.=20
 
 July, 1st dhn@ changed the state of the PR to repocopy and asked portmgr@ =
 to repocopy www/nanoblogger to www/nanoblogger-extra.=20
 
 Thinking that a repocopy is not what is needed here (at least I think so) =
 I wrote a followup using a webmail service that scrambled my follow so tha=
 t it was misfiled. linimon@ noticed it and migrated the contents of my fol=
 lowup: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports-bugs/2009-July/167=
 327.html
 
 After this migration the PR looks like the most important parts of it has =
 been lost (the patch and the shar archive).
 
 How do we proceed with this PR=3F As noted it's ok to close it and let me su=
 bmit another one.
 
 Regards Tobias
 
 PS: I really hope linimom@ is successful with his project to replace GNATS=
  ;)
 
 =5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F
